# gastown Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    gastown = {
      source = "kybernetes-systems/gastown"
    }
  }
}

provider "gastown" {
  hq_path = "/path/to/gt/hq"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hq_path` (String) Path to the Gas Town HQ directory.
